name: Bread Cakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak dry bread in water until soft. Squeeze as dry as possible.
2. Crumble and measure the crumbled bread.
3. Beat egg yolk, add milk, water, bread crumbs, and shortening.
4. Sift flour, measure, and sift with salt and baking powder. Add to first mixture.
5. Mix thoroughly. Fold in stiffly beaten egg white.
6. Drop by tablespoonfuls on a hot griddle.
7. Bake until well browned on both sides. 12 servings.
Mrs. J.E. Lewis, Brockton, MT.
